projects.name: Equinox App
projects.description: A Tele-Medicine and Clinical Care Network that enables patients to consult doctors via video calls and create appointments for both in-person and tele-medicine examinations.

projects.name: Tapcheck App
projects.description: An employer-sponsored financial wellness program. Employees can check with their employer’s eligibility before using the app.

projects.name: Automate
projects.description: An IoT-based solution company connecting the physical world with the internet through smart automation.

projects.name: Prayer Detector
projects.description: A machine learning project that detects prayer positions (rakaats) using sensor data and TensorFlow. Model trained on datasets of different prayer positions and deployed on Android.

projects.name: Inspection App
projects.description: Allows property addition and inspection management, covering various house areas like bedrooms, washrooms, garages, and kitchens.

projects.name: Oldy Baba App
projects.description: A face-aging Android app that lets users age themselves, add glasses, beards, moles, and more for fun photo transformations.
